title: GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About GAP India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India Asia Pacific Associates!
